MQ

Your move briefing

AI-generated

You're in the early setup phase for your move in New York, and you've got several important items to get ahead of: updating your address with the post office, making sure your tax records reflect your new location, getting a New York ID or driver's license if needed, confirming your passport is current, checking your immigration status if that applies to you, and arranging your electric service for your new place. Starting with mail and ID now will give you a solid foundation, and you can tackle the others as your moving timeline becomes clearer.

1
Set up mail & postal
It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.
2
Set up tax (irs)
It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.
3
Set up dmv
It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.

MOVING COMMAND CENTER

Start your move

Plan a move and we'll build your personalized checklist, surface the providers you need, and count down to the big day.

Plan a Move
Your dashboard
Full

Add Services

Select Address
+ Add New

QA Home

350 5th Avenue

New York, NY 10118
Choose Listed Providers

Showing unverified directory entries for NY

Listed providers, manual tracking only

Listed providers are directory entries, not proof of activation at your address. Adding one creates a LocateFlow service record; it does not update your address with the provider.

Add a local/custom provider

For dentists, gyms, local utilities, healthcare, and other private records. This creates a tracked service for manual follow-up only.

Add local/custom
Browse by category
(0)
No listed providers found for this location

No listed providers were found for NY. This does not mean service is unavailable; add a local/custom provider or continue without providers.

Add local/custom provider

Pick the address you want a monthly report for. Each PDF is generated on the server with branding, category breakdown, and full service details — no print dialog needed.

QA Home

0 services · $0.00/mo

PDF Report
Full Account Snapshot (PDF)

Single PDF with profile, subscription, every address with its services, moving plans, and task summary. Suitable for personal archive or audit hand-off.

Download PDF
Tax & Property Report (PDF) · Pro

Per-property summary with occupancy, service counts, monthly-equivalent and annualized costs, and a grand total — formatted for tax prep. Includes a "not tax advice" disclaimer.

results.title: LocateFlow | Moving Checklist, Utility Setup & Provider Tracker
results.bodyPreview:
Skip to main content
MQ

Your move briefing

AI-generated

You're in the early setup phase for your move in New York, and you've got several important items to get ahead of: updating your address with the post office, making sure your tax records reflect your new location, getting a New York ID or driver's license if needed, confirming your passport is current, checking your immigration status if that applies to you, and arranging your electric service for your new place. Starting with mail and ID now will give you a solid foundation, and you can tackle the others as your moving timeline becomes clearer.

1
Set up mail & postal
It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.
2
Set up tax (irs)
It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.
3
Set up dmv
It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.

MOVING COMMAND CENTER

Start your move

Plan a move and we'll build your personalized checklist, surface the providers you need, and count down to the big day.

Plan a Move
Your dashboard
Full Access

Welcome back. Here's what's happening across your addresses.

Customize
Add Address
Plan a move
Stats Overview
Expand widget
M

2Set up tax (irs)It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.
3Set up dmvIt's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.

Add Services

Choose a listed provider or add a local/custom provider to create a tracked service.

Select Address
+ Add New

QA Home

350 5th Avenue

New York, NY 10118
Choose Listed Providers

Showing unverified directory entries for NY

Listed providers, manual tracking only

Listed providers are directory entries, not proof of activation at your address. Adding one creates a LocateFlow service record; it does not update your address with the provider.

Add a local/custom provider

For dentists, gyms, local utilities, healthcare, and other private records. This creates a tracked service for manual follow-up only.

Add local/custom
Browse by category
(0)
No listed providers found for this location

No listed providers were found for NY. This does not mean service is unavailable; add a local/custom provider or continue without providers.

Export & Reports

Download reports and export your data

Confirm password
Monthly Expense Reports (PDF)

Pick the address you want a monthly report for. Each PDF is generated on the server with branding, category breakdown, and full service details — no print dialog needed.

QA Home

0 services · $0.00/mo

PDF Report
Full Account Snapshot (PDF)

Single PDF with profile, subscription, every address with its services, moving plans, and task summary. Suitable for personal archive or audit hand-off.

Download PDF
Tax & Property Report (PDF) · Pro

Per-property summary with occupancy, service counts, monthly-equivalent and annualized costs, and a grand total — formatted for tax prep. Includes a "not tax advice" disclaimer.

Download PDF

results.title: Help Center | LocateFlow
results.bodyPreview:
Skip to main content
MQ
Help Center

Find answers and guides for using LocateFlow

Articles
GETTING STARTED
Getting started
Set up your profile, first address, services, and optional moving plan.
CORE CONCEPTS
Providers vs. services
Understand the difference between directory entries and your tracked accounts.
MOVING
How moving tasks work
Moving tasks are local checklist items for you to complete manually.
PROVIDERS
Listed providers are unverified
Provider listings are directory guidance, not availability guarantees.
ACCOUNT
Account and security basics
Use Settings to manage passwords, sessions, and account access.
PRIVACY
Export or delete your data
Download your account data or request account deletion from Settings.
BILLING
Billing basics
Current billing flows are available from Settings when configured.
SUPPORT
Contact support
Open a support ticket from the Support page after signing in.
FAQ
CORE CONCEPTS
What is the difference between Providers and Services?
PROVIDERS
Does a listed provider mean it is available at my address?
ONBOARDING
Can I continue if no providers are listed?
MOVING
Does LocateFlow complete provider tasks for me?
PRIVACY
Can I export or delete my data?
Dashb
